overall.description: A smooth virtual tour through a game engine recreation of the plaza leading to Japan's National Diet Building in Tokyo. The camera moves steadily forward across the wide empty asphalt plaza on a bright sunny day, approaching the distinctive white building with its pyramid roof, then turns right and moves away. The scene features lush green trees lining both sides of the wide road and modern office buildings in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide urban plaza approach with distant government building

agents.ego_description: moving steadily forward across the empty paved plaza toward the distant National Diet Building

entered.detail: broad paved area with gray asphalt texture extending toward the horizon
dense line of green leafy trees forming the left boundary of the plaza
dense line of green leafy trees forming the right boundary of the plaza
distinctive white government building with pyramid-shaped roof and classical columns
tall dark glass office building visible behind the left tree line

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide, empty asphalt plaza flanked by dense green trees on both sides. In the far distance, the white National Diet Building with its distinctive pyramid roof is visible against a bright blue sky. The camera moves steadily forward, approaching a crosswalk marking on the pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: central avenue leading directly to the National Diet Building

agents.ego_description: continuing straight toward the National Diet Building which gradually grows larger in the frame

entered.detail: grassy and paved median strip running down the center of the wide avenue
white zebra crossing stripes painted on the asphalt surface

segments.scene_description: The camera proceeds straight down the central avenue, crossing white zebra markings on the asphalt. The National Diet Building grows progressively larger and more detailed, revealing its classical columned facade and central pyramid roof. A central median strip becomes visible, and the tree lines on both sides pass by closely as the building dominates the center of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza area turning away from main building toward side exit

events.description: camera begins turning right, changing direction away from the National Diet Building

agents.ego_description: turning right and moving away from the Diet Building, circling around the plaza area

segments.scene_description: The camera initiates a right turn, moving away from the National Diet Building which shifts to the left side of the frame before disappearing from view. The central median is left behind as the camera faces the open plaza extending to the right, with tree lines now visible on both sides of the new direction of travel.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement across a wide urban plaza that culminates in a rightward turn away from a monumental government building. It begins on an empty asphalt expanse flanked by dense green trees, moving steadily toward the distant white National Diet Building and its distinctive pyramid roof under a bright blue sky. As the camera proceeds across white zebra markings on the pavement, the building grows progressively larger and more detailed, its classical columned facade dominating the center of the frame. The scene then shifts as the camera initiates a right turn, causing the National Diet Building to slide to the left and disappear from view. Finally, the camera leaves the central median behind to face the open plaza extending to the right, with new lines of trees framing the direction of travel.
